suite.name: Epic3 Review System

kw.name: Suite Init
Run Process
kw.doc: Runs a process and waits for it to complete.

kw.name: Log
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Load Seed Output
Get File
kw.doc: Returns the contents of a specified file.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log
kw.msg: Loaded seed: A=cmmbopec90004usjs3aua37qz B=cmmbopecu0006usjsg1msw0c9 C=cmmboped60008usjsb6fux41o preDispute=cmmbopefc000fusjsm42zfo9h
kw.arg: Loaded seed: A=${BOOKING_A_ID} B=${BOOKING_B_ID} C=${BOOKING_C_ID} preDispute=${PRE_DISPUTE_ID}
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Read seed-output.json and set suite variables

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:3001/api, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '61', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "rf_passenger@test.com", "password": "password123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Try Admin Login
Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3001/api/auth/login path_url=/api/auth/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '57', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"email": "rf_admin@test.com", "password": "password123"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Log
kw.arg: WARNING: Admin login failed (${ADMIN_EMAIL_ENV}) — admin tests will be skipped
kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.
Single admin login attempt to conserve rate limit

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.
Run seed, create API session, login all users

test.name: TC-3.8 Passenger Sees Pending Reviews

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3001/api/reviews/pending path_url=/api/reviews/pending headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1ibjNlNWUwMDAxdXN0Y3BjZXI0NnZ6Iiwicm9sZSI6IlBBU1NFTkdFUiIsImJvb3RFcG9jaCI6MTc3MjYwNzM3NywiaWF0IjoxNzcyNjA3NDQ1LCJleHAiOjE3NzMyMTIyNDV9.XTqs4svpXthL4kvqa4tLKoLRUTEj9ToBzCTpGTs2y-Q'} body=None
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Should Be Equal As Integers
kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Should Be Equal
kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.name: Get Length
kw.doc: Returns and logs the length of the given item as an integer.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: Passenger should have at least 1 pending review
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

test.doc: GET /reviews/pending returns bookings not yet reviewed

test.name: TC-3.1 Create 5-Star Review Successfully

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create List
kw.doc: Returns a list containing given items.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'bookingId': 'cmmbopec90004usjs3aua37qz', 'rating': 5, 'tags': ['polite', 'safe_driving'], 'comment': 'คนขับสุภาพมากครับ ขับรถปลอดภัย แนะนำเลย'}
kw.arg: comment=คนขับสุภาพมากครับ ขับรถปลอดภัย แนะนำเลย
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3001/api/reviews path_url=/api/reviews headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1ibjNlNWUwMDAxdXN0Y3BjZXI0NnZ6Iiwicm9sZSI6IlBBU1NFTkdFUiIsImJvb3RFcG9jaCI6MTc3MjYwNzM3NywiaWF0IjoxNzcyNjA3NDQ1LCJleHAiOjE3NzMyMTIyNDV9.XTqs4svpXthL4kvqa4tLKoLRUTEj9ToBzCTpGTs2y-Q', 'Content-Length': '330', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"bookingId": "cmmbopec90004usjs3aua37qz", "rating": 5, "tags": ["polite", "safe_driving"], "comment": "\\u0e04\\u0e19\\u0e02\\u0e31\\u0e1a\\u0e2a\\u0e38\\u0e20\\u0e32\\u0e1e\\u0e21\\u0e32\\u0e01\\u0e04\\u0e23\\u0e31\\u0e1a \\u0e02\\u0e31\\u0e1a\\u0e23\\u0e16\\u0e1b\\u0e25\\u0e2d\\u0e14\\u0e20\\u0e31\\u0e22 \\u0e41\\u0e19\\u0e30\\u0e19\\u0e33\\u0e40\\u0e25\\u0e22"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Fails if objects are unequal after converting them to integers.

kw.doc: Fails if the given objects are unequal.

kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.doc: Logs the given message with the given level.

test.doc: POST /reviews — 5 stars with positive tags [POST #1 of 6]

kw.name: Skip If
kw.doc: Skips the rest of the current test if the ``condition`` is True.

kw.name: Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'reviewId': 'cmmbopeqb0001us8cn9v3d7kg', 'reason': 'INACCURATE', 'detail': 'ผู้โดยสารให้ข้อมูลผิดพลาด ผมมาตรงเวลาตามนัดทุกครั้งครับ'}
kw.arg: detail=ผู้โดยสารให้ข้อมูลผิดพลาด ผมมาตรงเวลาตามนัดทุกครั้งครับ
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3001/api/reviews/disputes path_url=/api/reviews/disputes headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.32.5', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJjbW1ibjNlM2wwMDAwdXN0Y3VmbGwwNGhyIiwicm9sZSI6IkRSSVZFUiIsImJvb3RFcG9jaCI6MTc3MjYwNzM3NywiaWF0IjoxNzcyNjA3NDQ1LCJleHAiOjE3NzMyMTIyNDV9.UHzIsoPt47Id1NYXf5zjMDBSw1LTVUT4DJRR9IIbj7o', 'Content-Length': '404', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"reviewId": "cmmbopeqb0001us8cn9v3d7kg", "reason": "INACCURATE", "detail": "\\u0e1c\\u0e39\\u0e49\\u0e42\\u0e14\\u0e22\\u0e2a\\u0e32\\u0e23\\u0e43\\u0e2b\\u0e49\\u0e02\\u0e49\\u0e2d\\u0e21\\u0e39\\u0e25\\u0e1c\\u0e34\\u0e14\\u0e1e\\u0e25\\u0e32\\u0e14 \\u0e1c\\u0e21\\u0e21\\u0e32\\u0e15\\u0e23\\u0e07\\u0e40\\u0e27\\u0e25\\u0e32\\u0e15\\u0e32\\u0e21\\u0e19\\u0e31\\u0e14\\u0e17\\u0e38\\u0e01\\u0e04\\u0e23\\u0e31\\u0e49\\u0e07\\u0e04\\u0e23\\u0e31\\u0e1a"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.doc: Fails if ``container`` does not contain ``item`` one or more times.

test.doc: After hiding review, driver stats should update

kw.name: Delete All Sessions
kw.doc: Removes all the session objects

suite.doc: Epic 3 — Ride Review & Rating System API Tests Covers TC-3.1 to TC-3.14 and Admin TC-4.1, TC-4.2 Rate-limit aware: authLimiter = 10 POST/15 min (shared login+reviews+disputes) Run: robot --outputdir results epic3_review_system.robot
